name: Monkfish and Pistachio
steps: Prep monkfish and brine for 20 minutes (leave overnight preferably).
Set the circulator to 62 degrees with an oil bath.
Insert monkfish and drop in oil.
Remove from the yakitori to dry briefly.
Ready for a final brush with burnt seed mole.
There should be a nice rainbow on the fish.
Finely chop the garlic, leeks, and onion, then brown.
Add the vinegar and reduce. Once reduced, add the miso and cook for a further 2 minutes.
Finally add nuts, vegetable stock, and pistachio.
Remove from heat and blend to a smooth sauce.
Blend three times, pass, and vacuum pack.
